title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, not bad at all! Even if it was a fluke, you
executed the optimal strategy nearly flawlessly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So what are you planning on doing with all these
plushies?
choice_data_list: I haven't really thought about it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch. Well, I guess that tracks.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Doto likes this kinda stuff, so want me to take
'em off your hands?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, go find a bag to put 'em all in for now.
Hurry up.
